introSection: Paw Patrol is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain. The coaster is based on the Canadian animated series Paw Patrol.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride originally opened on 2 June 2007 as Vagones Locos (Spanish for Crazy Wagons). It was closed for renovations in 2017. On 26 May 2018, with the addition of Nickelodeon Land at the park, the coaster was rethemed and renamed Patrulla Canina (the Spanish name for Paw Patrol).

fullText:
Paw Patrol is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain. The coaster is based on the Canadian animated series Paw Patrol.

The ride originally opened on 2 June 2007 as Vagones Locos (Spanish for Crazy Wagons). It was closed for renovations in 2017. On 26 May 2018, with the addition of Nickelodeon Land at the park, the coaster was rethemed and renamed Patrulla Canina (the Spanish name for Paw Patrol).
